checks.text: Colors map to Fluent alias tokens (brand/neutral/status), no off-token hex.
Type uses the Segoe UI font stack.
Corner rounding uses the Fluent border-radius scale (2/4/6/8).
Spacing uses the Fluent spacing ramp (4/8/12/16/20/24).
Surfaces use Fluent depth/shadow ramps, not arbitrary shadows.
Foreground tokens meet WCAG AA against their background tokens.
